## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? -->

## Related issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #123 -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / maintenance

## How was this tested?

<!-- Commands you ran and what you observed. -->

- [ ] `python -m pytest -q` passes
- [ ] `cd ui && npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] Verified the change manually in the running app

## Checklist

- [ ] My PR is focused on a single logical change
- [ ] I added/updated tests where it makes sense
- [ ] I did **not** commit any secrets, `.env` files, credentials, or machine-specific paths
- [ ] I updated docs/README where relevant
